title: Spectre
description: Improvements (or not) to Phantoms! Reworked Mechanics, new items, and more!
body:
Spectre adds new configuration options relating to the Phantom, as well as some of this mod's related features!

This mod also adds a new weapon made from Phantom Membranes and other items introduced in Spectre.

The Spectre Scythe

The Spectre Scythe can be crafted using 3 Phantom Membranes, 1 Ghoul silk, 1 Phantom Eye, and 2 Sticks.


This versatile weapon can be enchanted with 7 new enchantments, each can be found below.

Gazing

Inflicts the target with the Pursuing effect if the target is also inflicted by the Enlightened effect.

This enchantment only has 1 level.

This enchantment cannot be applied to a tool that has the Cultist enchantment.

Cultist

Inflicts the target with the Enlightened effect.

This enchantment only has 1 level.

This enchantment cannot be applied to a tool that has the Gazing enchantment.

Blood Rush

Provides the player with Strength depending on the level of Blood Rush. However, the strength effect can only be activated when using the Unwearied Antique in the offhand and then right-clicking with both the Scythe and Antique in each hand.

This enchantment has 3 levels.

Adrift

Provides the player with the Slow Falling effect.

This enchantment cannot be applied to a tool that has the Cloaking enchantment.

This enchantment only has 1 level.

Cloaking

Functionally acts as Invisibility but without particle effects.

This enchantment cannot be applied to a tool that has the Adrift enchantment.

This enchantment only has 1 level.

Connection

Acts similarly to Looting, but instead allows the player to obtain a new drop: Phantom Eyes.

With the second level of Connection, you can also get additional Phantom Membranes.

This enchantment has 2 levels. This is the only new enchantment that can be applied to both swords and the Spectre Scythe.

Spiritual Leech

You leech health off of Phantoms that you attack.

This enchantment only has 1 level.

Scythe of Ichor


This weapon can be enchanted with 5 additional enchants, as well as certain previously stated enchantments.

  • Cultist
  • Gazing
  • Connection
  • Spiritual Leech

Nemesis

Inflicts the target with the Infliction effect, which swiftly damages the opponent.

This enchantment only has 1 level.

Writhing

Slowly damages the wielder, but provides Strength 2.

This enchantment cannot be applied to a tool that has the Sanguinary enchantment.

This enchantment only has 1 level.

Eclipse

Provides the Resistance 3 effect and inflicts the target with the Glowing effect.

This enchantment only has 1 level.

Vigilant

Provides the Speed and Night Vision effects.

This enchantment only has 1 level.

Sanguinary

Provides the player with the Strength 5 effect. However, the strength effect can only be activated when using the Unwearied Antique in the offhand and then right-clicking with both the Scythe and Antique in each hand.

This also comes at the sacrifice of 8 HP (4 Hearts).

This enchantment cannot be applied to a tool that has the Writhing enchantment.

This enchantment only has 1 level.
